programs.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programs.desc: Fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles; a burger with a house-made chorizo patty; smoked pulled pork with a Kansas City-style barbecue rub.

programs.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programs.desc: Michael Symon chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece; pork buns in Columbus, Ohio; a roasted onion stuffed with smoked pork and brisket.

programs.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programs.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, the City of Bridges; he tries dried, salty cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, and Port wine.

programs.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programs.desc: Andrew highlights Tuscan specialties like small-batch extra virgin olive oil, spicy fish stew served over crusty bread, chickpea pancakes and whole fish simmered quickly in spicy tomato sauce.

programs.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programs.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, discovering ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano and tortellini in broth.

programs.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programs.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey, including all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs, and Dominican marinated pork.
